text:
Cost-Benefit Analysis of AI Interviewing Tools

This article examines whether AI interviewing platforms justify their investment through a structured cost-benefit framework.

Main Cost Categories Identified: Subscription fees ($99-$500/month for startups; $500-$3,000/month for mid-market); Implementation and onboarding efforts; ATS and system integrations; Internal change management and team adaptation.

Quantified Benefits: The article presents concrete efficiency gains: 'Screening Time per Candidate' drops from 30 minutes to 0 minutes, while time-to-hire compresses from '21-30 days' to '10-15 days.' Estimated annual recruiter time savings exceed 800 hours.

ROI Scenarios: The platform recommends AI interviewing for organizations processing 100+ annual hires, managing high application volumes across multiple time zones, or prioritizing diversity initiatives requiring documented, bias-resistant evaluation methods.

Strategic Value: Beyond numerical metrics, the content highlights less quantifiable advantages like employer brand strengthening, improved data visibility, and compliance readiness.

The analysis concludes that for appropriately-scaled hiring operations, AI interviewing delivers measurable return on investment through operational efficiency and hiring quality improvements.
